@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team ∧ low_ops ∧ fast_ship
P: deadline → split(post_release)
V: "6" ∧ "4 months"
A: store("PostgreSQL")

[AUDIT]
Goal: decide(modular_monolith).
Constraints: team and low ops and fast shipping.
Plan: deadline then split(post_release).
Verify: "6" and "4 months".
Answer target: store("PostgreSQL").
